highlights: 📐 Appointment modal reduced to 2/3 width — better desktop layout

sections.title: ✨ UX Improvement
items: EditAppointmentModal, AppointmentForm, AppointmentDetailsModal all set to max-w-[900px]
Modal now takes 2/3 width on desktop instead of stretching full-width
Appointment module family consistently sized across all variants

highlights: 🔧 Module consistency fix — unified appointment forms, color picker, status labels

sections.title: 🐛 Bug Fix
items: Added color picker to AppointmentForm (create) — was missing, only edit had it
Removed duplicate color definitions from EditAppointmentModal — now uses shared constants
Unified status labels across all appointment views (Đang hẹn / Đã đến / Hủy hẹn)
EmployeeForm now uses shared LocationSelector instead of native <select>
Removed hardcoded max-width from PaymentForm

sections.title: 🏗️ Architecture
items: APPOINTMENT_CARD_COLORS now includes previewGradient for color picker dots
Added APPOINTMENT_STATUS_OPTIONS to constants — single source of truth
Added APPOINTMENT_STATUS_LABELS_VI to constants — unified Vietnamese labels
Added @crossref:related[] annotations to 7 module files for future maintenance

highlights: 📐 Reduced appointment card width by 1/3 — fits more in view

sections.title: ✨ UX Improvement
items: DayView now shows 6 columns instead of 4 (66% of original width)
Colored cards are more compact, showing more appointments at once
Color still visible but doesn't dominate the view

highlights: 🎨 Fixed appointment card color mismatch across all views

sections.title: 🐛 Bug Fix
items: WeekView COLOR_MAP was completely wrong — code 0 (blue) showed as rose/red
All 8 color codes were shifted/incorrect in WeekView
Now all views show the same color for the same appointment

sections.title: 🔧 Architecture
items: Created APPOINTMENT_CARD_COLORS single source of truth in constants/index.ts
WeekView, DayView, TodayAppointments, AppointmentCard all import from one place
Impossible for colors to diverge across views again

highlights: 🎨 Design standardization — All forms match AppointmentForm gold standard

sections.title: 🎨 Design Standard
items: AppointmentForm set as GOLD STANDARD for all modal forms
All 5 forms now use modal-container + modal-content + modal-body pattern
Consistent orange gradient header with Vietnamese titles
Consistent footer with 'Hủy bỏ' + primary action button

sections.title: 🌐 Vietnamese Labels
items: AppointmentForm: Khách hàng, Bác sĩ, Chi nhánh, Dịch vụ, Ghi chú
ServiceForm: Dịch vụ, Khách hàng, Bác sĩ, Chi nhánh, Tổng chi phí, Số răng
PaymentForm: Khách hàng, Dịch vụ, Số tiền, Phương thức thanh toán, Ghi nhận
EmployeeForm: Họ và tên, Điện thoại, Bác sĩ/Trợ lý/Lễ tân, Trạng thái
EditAppointmentModal: Bệnh nhân, Bác sĩ, Chi nhánh, Dịch vụ, Trạng thái, Ghi chú
TodayAppointments header → 'Lịch hẹn hôm nay'
PatientCheckIn header → 'Đón tiếp / Tiếp nhận bệnh nhân'

sections.title: ✨ New Features
items: AppointmentForm now has service dropdown from catalog (no more free text)
AppointmentForm now has 'Loại khách' toggle (Khách mới / Tái khám)
AppointmentForm now has 'Thời gian dự kiến' field (estimated duration)
PaymentForm now uses real CustomerSelector + ServiceCatalogSelector
PaymentForm now uses LocationSelector instead of free text
All forms use label icons (User, Stethoscope, MapPin, etc.)

sections.title: 🔧 Improvements
items: CustomerForm wrapper now uses modal-container CSS classes for mobile support
Customers page uses modal-container for edit/create modals
EditAppointmentModal search placeholder → Vietnamese
Appointments page labels → Vietnamese (stats, tabs, placeholders)
All form buttons use consistent 'Hủy bỏ' / action label pattern

highlights: ✨ Simplified appointment statuses + Service catalog dropdown

sections.title: ✨ New Features
items: Service dropdown linked to product catalog (no more free text)
Thời gian dự kiến field for estimated appointment duration
Loại khách field: Khách mới / Tái khám

sections.title: 🔧 Improvements
items: Simplified status options to 3 states: Đang hẹn, Đã đến, Hủy hẹn
Updated TodayAppointments labels to Vietnamese

highlights: 🔐 Customer View All permission + X button to close release notes

sections.title: ✨ New Features
items: customers.view.all permission - Admin can view all customers without typing
Non-admin users must type 3+ characters to search customers
Search required message shown to restricted users
CSKH (Customer Service) role assignment for customers

sections.title: 🔧 Improvements
items: Added X button to close 'New in this version' popup
Dismissed notes stay hidden until next version update
Version sync fixed - now consistently shows 0.3.0 everywhere

highlights: 📝 Release Notes popup - Click version badge to see what's new!

sections.title: ✨ New Features
items: Inline release notes preview below version badge
Click to open full release notes modal
Persistent tooltip on click (no more disappearing!)
View Release Notes button in tooltip
Current version highlighted in release notes
Expandable version history with detailed changelogs

sections.title: 🔧 Improvements
items: Fixed tooltip hover behavior - now click to toggle
Click outside to close tooltip
Cleaner version badge UI with sparkle indicator

highlights: ✨ Bidirectional hover linking between Patient Check-in and Today's Appointments

sections.title: ✨ New Features
items: Hover on Patient Check-in card highlights matching appointment in Today's Appointments
Hover on Today's Appointments highlights corresponding Patient Check-in card
Auto-scroll to matching appointment when hovering Patient Check-in
Visual ring highlight (blue) on linked appointments
Smooth scrolling animation between zones

sections.title: 🔧 Improvements
items: Fixed VPS deployment configuration
Added API proxy to nginx config
Fixed React hooks error in version display

highlights: 🐛 Fixed React error #310 - Version display hooks issue

sections.title: 🐛 Bug Fixes
items: Fixed React hooks error causing blank page on VPS
Removed unused variables in useVersionCheck hook
Fixed TypeScript errors in version check context

highlights: 🌍 Added timezone support and VPS deployment

sections.title: ✨ New Features
items: Global timezone selector in Settings
Timezone-aware appointment scheduling
VPS deployment with Docker containers

sections.title: 🔧 Infrastructure
items: Docker Compose setup for frontend + backend + DB
Nginx reverse proxy configuration
Automated deployment scripts

highlights: 🔄 Auto-update system - No more hard refresh needed!

sections.title: ✨ New Features
items: Automatic update detection every 5 minutes
Update notification in sidebar footer
One-click update to refresh page
Version display with git commit info

sections.title: ✨ New Features
items: Zone 1: Patient Check-in / Reception
Zone 2: Today's Services / Activity table
Zone 3: Today's Appointments sidebar
Status change dropdown for check-in workflow
Color-coded appointment cards
